outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed: 0DTE positive GEX suppresses spot volatility; Weekly/Monthly negative GEX amplifies moves if 6350 support breaks
outlook.summary: Bearish smirk skew across all expiries (ratio 1.69-2.05) with elevated PCR (1.50-1.61). Spot hovers just below 0DTE gamma flip and Max Pain at 6600, creating strong magnetic attraction. 6350 RESONANCE level provides critical structural support across all timeframes. Dealers long 0DTE gamma but short Weekly/Monthly gamma suggests contained intraday action with volatility expansion risk on support breaks.

0DTE Max Pain aligned with significant Call OI (3042). Primary dealer target. Only 14 pts above spot - strong magnetic pull expected with positive 0DTE GEX.
0DTE gamma equilibrium. Spot (6586.25) sits just 11 pts below - critical inflection for directional bias. Positive GEX here suppresses volatility.
CONFLUENCE: Major resistance across Weekly (12373 Call OI) and Monthly (8637 total OI). Hard ceiling with dealer hedging pressure above.

Weekly Max Pain level. Secondary magnet target if price sustains above 6600 0DTE target. Negative Weekly GEX (-1.70B) may accelerate moves toward this level.
